programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.sub_title: Peace, Love and a Fallen Pine Tree
programs.desc: A winter storm and a fallen tree jeopardize to destroy a family's Bear Pond property; Chase and the Cabin Masters come to the rescue, preserving the camp's oddities and adding space for the soon-arriving next generation.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.sub_title: A Cabin for the Whole Family
programs.desc: It is a great opportunity for Chase and the team to rebuild and ultimately repair a cabin for a man and his family, but they will have to act quickly so they can finish before winter arrives so that the family can enjoy it for years to come.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: A family wants to turn their boathouse-turned-cabin into a summer retreat; with the camp located directly on the water, the Cabin Masters will have to figure out how to reinforce it, address uneven walls and create more space for this family of four.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: Greg and Denise purchase a cabin on the shore of Messalonskee Lake; this is one of the largest budgets the crew has ever had to work with, so the team works hard to help the couple transform this picturesque diamond in the rough into a polished gem.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: The Cabin Masters are summoned to the medieval role-playing community of Burgundar to repair their market, fire pit, and gathering inn; a ferocious rainstorm and winter weather threaten to thwart the team's grand plans for the camp.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: The Cabin Masters restore a generational camp as the family honors their 92-year-old matriarch. They update the cabin with fresh spaces and heartfelt touches, racing to ready it for future generations while preserving its family legacy and history.
